spec.expr:
WITH (
  monthlyImport = sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_import_cost_daily_eur[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_year, local_month),
  monthlyExport = sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_export_credit_daily_eur[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_year, local_month),
)
label_join(
  label_set(clamp_min(monthlyImport - monthlyExport, 0), "kind", "Costs"),
  "series", " ", "local_year", "kind"
)

WITH (
  monthlyImport = sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_import_cost_daily_eur[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_year, local_month),
  monthlyExport = sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_export_credit_daily_eur[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_year, local_month),
  yearlyExport = sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_export_credit_daily_eur[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_year),
)
label_join(
  label_set(clamp_min(monthlyExport - monthlyImport, 0), "kind", "Income"),
  "series", " ", "local_year", "kind"
)
and on (local_year) (yearlyExport > 0)

properties.value: Saved electricity price through dynamic tariff

spec.title: Driving costs $vehicle
spec.description: Values are rough estimates based on averages. External charging sessions are not included.

properties.value: Driving cost savings thanks to PV
Driving cost savings vs combustion engine

spec.title: PV system amortization
spec.description: For less than 365 days of data, values are extrapolated to a full year with corresponding inaccuracy depending on the captured period.

properties.value: Energy costs so far without PV

spec.title: Battery amortization
spec.description: For less than 365 days of data, values are extrapolated to a full year with corresponding inaccuracy depending on the captured period.

spec.title: Average top 30 days/year
spec.description: Uses the average yield of the best 30 days per year. This can help identify possible degradation, but must be interpreted in context. Individual years are not conclusive on their own.

spec.title: Average top 5 days/month
spec.description: Uses the average yield of the best 5 days per month. This can help identify possible degradation, but must be interpreted in context. Individual months are not conclusive on their own.

spec.title: Average yearly specific yield
spec.description: Total captured PV yield normalized to installed kWp and covered data years. Incomplete years and data gaps affect this value.

spec.name: dashboardBuild
spec.label: Build
spec.description: Build information is set during deployment.

spec.name: vehicleBlocklist
spec.label: Vehicle blocklist
spec.description: Regex for vehicles that should not be shown. Use ^none$ when nothing should be filtered. For multiple exact names use ^(Vehicle A|Vehicle B)$.

spec.name: vehicle
spec.label: Vehicle
spec.description: Vehicles shown by the repeated driving-cost panels. Keep multi-select enabled so users can choose one or more vehicles.

spec.name: speicherkapazitaet
spec.label: Battery capacity / Wh
spec.description: Usable home battery capacity in Wh

spec.name: installedWattPeak
spec.label: installedWattPeak
spec.description: Installed PV peak in kWp. Used for specific-yield panels.

spec.name: inverterPortalTitle
spec.label: Inverter portal name
spec.description: Name of the inverter portal for the portal link.

spec.name: inverterPortalUrl
spec.label: Inverter portal URL
spec.description: URL used to open the inverter portal.
